description.en: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.

warp.bot: Use this when a contact replies to a follow-up message. Tags them as replied and logs the interaction as an activity via the generic contact-activity-log warp.

inputs.name: Contact
inputs.bot: The hashid of the CRM contact who replied.

inputs.name: Description

description.en: Summary of what the contact said
description.fr: Résumé de la réponse du contact
description.es: Resumen de lo que dijo el contacto
description.it: Riepilogo di ciò che ha detto il contatto

inputs.bot: Brief summary of what the contact said in their reply. This gets logged as an activity on the contact.

success.en: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.de: Antwort erfasst. Kontakt als geantwortet markiert.
success.es: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.fr: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.ro: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.it: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.

en: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message
Tag a contact as replied to stop further automated follow-ups
Log a reply event with a summary of what the contact said
de: Erfassen, dass ein Kontakt auf eine Follow-up-Nachricht geantwortet hat
Einen Kontakt als geantwortet markieren, um weitere automatisierte Follow-ups zu stoppen
Ein Antwort-Ereignis mit einer Zusammenfassung protokollieren

en.question: What happens after I record a reply?
en.answer: The contact is tagged as followups-replied, which signals the host system to stop automated sequence execution. The reply is also logged as an activity.

de.question: Was passiert, nachdem ich eine Antwort erfasst habe?
de.answer: Der Kontakt wird als followups-replied getaggt, was dem Host-System signalisiert, die automatische Sequenzausführung zu stoppen. Die Antwort wird zusätzlich als Aktivität protokolliert.
